---
title: "Jones Island Effluent Exceedance Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    fig_caption: false
geometry: margin=0.7in
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 6.5, fig.height = 4.5, out.width = "100%", dpi = 300
)

library(mmsd.sysmon)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(gt)

param_tbl <- tribble(
  ~varnum, ~parameter_name, ~limit, ~method,
  6101, "BOD5", 15, "mean",
  6100, "TSS", 15, "mean",
  6103, "TP", 0.50, "mean",
  6102, "TN", 5, "mean",
  6114, "Fecal Coliform", 200 , "geo_mean")
  
  
ss_dat <- get_wims_data(varnum = c(param_tbl$varnum), 
                        start_date = "2008-01-01", 
                        end_date = "2026-04-29",
                        db_name = "wims_ji")


#find missing data
all_dates <- seq(min(as.Date("2008-01-01")), max(as.Date("2026-04-29")), by = "day")

missing_dates <- tibble(
  date_time = all_dates) |>
  left_join(ss_dat |> select(date_time,varnum)) |>
  count(date_time) |> 
  filter(n != 5)  |>
  pull(date_time) 

missing_params <- 
  ss_dat |>
  select(date_time, var_name) |>
  filter(date_time %in% missing_dates) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = var_name, values_from = var_name, values_fn = length) |>
  arrange(date_time)

#create a function to calculate monthly mean and geo mean
calc_monthly_mean <- function(data, var){
  data |>
    filter(varnum == var) |>
    mutate(month = floor_date(date_time, "month")) |>
    group_by(month) |>
    summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
    select(month, value) |>
    mutate(varnum = var, method = "mean")
}

calc_monthly_geo_mean <- function(data, var){
  data |>
    filter(varnum == var) |>
    mutate(month = floor_date(date_time, "month")) |>
    group_by(month) |>
    summarise(value = exp(mean(log(value), na.rm = TRUE))) |>
    select(month, value) |>
    mutate(varnum = var, method = "geo_mean")
}

#apply the function to all the parameters
mean_Vars <- param_tbl |> filter(method == "mean") |> pull(varnum) |> unique()
monthly_means <- map_df(.x = mean_Vars, .f = ~calc_monthly_mean(ss_dat, .x))

geo_mean_Vars <- param_tbl |> filter(method == "geo_mean") |> pull(varnum) |> unique()
monthly_geo_means <- map_df(.x = geo_mean_Vars, .f = ~calc_monthly_geo_mean(ss_dat, .x))

results <-
  bind_rows(monthly_means, monthly_geo_means) |>
  left_join(param_tbl |> select(varnum, parameter_name) |> distinct()) |>
  mutate(
    value = 
       case_when(
      !parameter_name %in% c("TN","TP") ~ round(value, digits = 0),
      parameter_name == "TP" ~ round(value, digits = 2),
      parameter_name == "TN" ~ round(value, digits = 1)
      )
  )

#calculate limit exceedances
exceedance_months <-  
  results |>
  left_join(param_tbl |> select(varnum, limit), by = c("varnum" = "varnum")) |>
  mutate(exceedance = if_else(value > limit, TRUE, FALSE)) |>
  filter(exceedance == TRUE) |>
  mutate(date = month,
         month = month(date,label = TRUE),
         year = year(date)) |>
  select(year, month, value, limit, varnum, parameter_name) |>
  arrange(year, month) |>
  rename(Year = year, Month = month, Value = value, Limit = limit,
         Parameter = parameter_name, Varnum = varnum) |>
  mutate(Value = round(Value,digits = 2))

exceedance_n <-
  exceedance_months |>
  count(Varnum,Parameter, Limit) 


#find missing data
all_dates <- seq(min(as.Date("2019-01-01")), max(as.Date("2026-04-29")), by = "day")

missing_dates <- tibble(
  date_time = all_dates) |>
  left_join(ss_dat |> select(date_time,varnum)) |>
  count(date_time) |>
  filter(n != 5)  |>
  pull(date_time)

```

## Background and Methods

<span style = "font-size:16px">
This report provides an overview of the Jones Island effluent data
collected between 2008 and present. To identify exceedances, analyses
were performed in which select parameters were compared against their
contract discharge limits. Parameters included within the analyses
were as follows: Total Phosphorus (TP), Total Suspended Solids (TSS),
Biochemical Oxygen Demand (BOD5), Nitrogen Ammonia Total (NH3-N), and
Fecal Coliform.

</span>

<span style = "font-size:16px">
Contract limits for each of the parameters are listed below. For fecal coliform,
both current and historical limits were analyzed. For all parameters,
values were rounded to match the number of significant figures included
within their contract limits. For values below detection limits or too
numerous to count, signs like “\>” or “\<” were omitted. Missing data are noted 
in the appendix of this report.  </span>
<br>
<br>
<br>

<hr>


```{r, fig.align = 'center'}

exceedance_tbl <- tribble(
  ~Parameter, ~Limit, ~Metric, ~'Exceedances', ~'Date Range',
  "TP", "0.50 mg/L", "Monthly Mean", 1, '2008 - Present',
  "TSS", "15 mg/L","Monthly Mean", 0, '2008 - Present',
  "BOD5", "15 mg/L","Monthly Mean", 0, '2008 - Present',
  "NH3-N", "5.0 mg/L","Monthly Mean", 0, '2008 - Present',
  "Fecal coliform (Historic)", "100 CFU/100mL","Geometric Mean", 0, '2008 - Jul 2023',
  "Fecal coliform (Current)", "200 CFU/100mL","Geometric Mean", 0, 'Aug 2023 - Present' ) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Summary of Exceedances"
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    table.font.size = px(18),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    column_labels.padding = px(5),
    heading.title.font.size = px(25),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(20)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "top", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "bottom", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_fill(color = "lightgray")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(Parameter))
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgray"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = TRUE)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "left", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "right", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5))
    ),
    locations = cells_body(rows = TRUE)
  ) |>
    cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = everything())

gtsave(exceedance_tbl, "exceedance_tbl.png", vwidth = 1400, vheight = 900)
knitr::include_graphics("exceedance_tbl.png")

```

<hr> 
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>


# Total Phosphorus

<br>

```{r tp, fig.width=7, fig.align='center', fig.height=5}
tss_dat <- filter(results, varnum == 6103)
tss_dat <- mutate(tss_dat,Exceedance =  if_else(value > 0.5, "0.50mg/L Limit","None"))

limit_labels <-
  data.frame(
    x = c(ymd_hms("2020-01-01 00:00:00"), ymd_hms("2020-01-01 00:00:00")),
    y = c(0.5),
    label = c("Limit (0.50 mg/L)"))

ggplot(data = tss_dat) +
  geom_line(aes(x = month, y = value)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = month, y = value, color = Exceedance), size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = '#c92c3a') +
  geom_text(data = limit_labels, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label), vjust = -1, size = 4) +
  labs(title = "Jones Island Effluent Total Phosphorus Concentration",
       subtitle = "Values represent monthly means",
       y = "Total Phosphorus (mg/L)",
       x = "") +
  theme_classic()  +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#c92c3a","gray20")) +
  ylim(0,1.25) +
    xlim(as.POSIXct("2008-12-15"), as.POSIXct("2026-04-29")) 


```
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

# Total Phosphorus (cont.)

<br>

```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.align = 'center'}

tp_tbl <- results %>%
  mutate(Year = year(month),
         Month = month(month, label = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(parameter_name == "TP") %>%
  mutate(Value = round(value, digits = 3)) %>%
  select(Year, Month, Value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Month, values_from = Value) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Jones Island Effluent TP Concentration (mg/L)",
    subtitle = "Values represent monthly means"
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    table.font.size = px(18),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    column_labels.padding = px(5),
    heading.title.font.size = px(25),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(20)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "top", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "bottom", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_fill(color = "lightgray")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(Year))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgray"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "left", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "right", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5))
    ),
    locations = cells_body(rows = TRUE)
  ) %>%
         tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = '#c92c3a'),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = c(Oct),
      rows = 16
    )) |>
  # data_color(
  #   columns = lubridate::month(1:12,label = TRUE),  # Adjust to your actual month column names
  #   colors = scales::col_bin(
  #     bins = c(0.5001, 2, 3),
  #     palette = c("darkred", "darkred"),
  #     domain = NULL
  #   )
  # ) |>
    tab_source_note(
    source_note = html(paste(
html( "<span style='color:#c92c3a;'> Red </span> values exceed current limit of 0.50mg/L."))
    )
    )
  
gtsave(tp_tbl, "tp_tbl.png")

#lets insert this table below
knitr::include_graphics("tp_tbl.png")


```

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>


# Total Suspended Solids

<br>

```{r, tss}
tss_dat <- filter(results, varnum == 6100)
tss_dat <- mutate(tss_dat,Exceedance =  if_else(value > 15, "15mg/L Limit","None"))

limit_labels <-
  data.frame(
    x = c(ymd_hms("2020-01-01 00:00:00"), ymd_hms("2020-01-01 00:00:00")),
    y = c(15),
    label = c("Limit (15 mg/L)"))
    
ggplot(data = tss_dat) +
  geom_line(aes(x = month, y = value)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = month, y = value, color = Exceedance), size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 15, linetype = "dashed", color = '#c92c3a') +
  geom_text(data = limit_labels, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label), vjust = -1) +
  labs(title = "Jones Island Effluent Total Suspended Solids Concentration",
       subtitle = "Values represent monthly means",
       y = "TSS (mg/L)",
       x = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  #lets make the points gray if exceedance is no and dark red if yes
  scale_color_manual(values = c( "#c92c3a", "gray20")) +
    theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.position = "none")  +
  ylim(0,20) +
    xlim(as.POSIXct("2008-12-15"), as.POSIXct("2024-08-30")) 
  
```
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

# Total Suspended Solids (cont.)

<br>

```{r tss_tbl, fig.align = 'center'}

tss_tbl <- 
  results |>
  mutate(Year =year(month),
         Month = month(month, label = TRUE)) |>
  filter(parameter_name == "TSS") |>
  mutate(Value = round(value, digits = 2)) |>
  select(Year, Month, Value) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Month, values_from = Value) |>
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Jones Island Effluent TSS Concentration (mg/L)",
    subtitle  = "Values represent monthly means",
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    table.font.size = px(18),
    column_labels.padding = px(5),
    heading.title.font.size = px(25),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(20)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "top", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "bottom", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_fill(color = "lightgray")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(Year))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgray"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "left", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "right", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5))
    ),
    locations = cells_body(rows = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  # data_color(
  #   columns = lubridate::month(1:12,label = TRUE),  # Adjust to your actual month column names
  #   colors = scales::col_bin(
  #     bins = c(15.0001, 20, 25),
  #     palette = c("darkred", "darkred"),
  #     domain = NULL
  #   )
  # ) |>
    tab_source_note(
    source_note = html(paste(
html( "<span style='color:#c92c3a;'> Red </span> values exceed current limit of 15mg/L."))
    )
    )

gtsave(tss_tbl, "tss_tbl.png")
knitr::include_graphics("tss_tbl.png")



```

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>


# 5-Day Biochemical Oxygen Demand

<br>


```{r bod}

bod_dat <- filter(results, varnum == 6101)
bod_dat <- mutate(bod_dat,
                  value = round(value, digits = 0),
                  Exceedance =  case_when(
  value > 15 ~ "Limit (15 mg/L)",TRUE ~ "None"))

limit_labels <-
  data.frame(
    x = c(ymd_hms("2020-02-28 00:00:00")),
    y = c(15),
    label = c("Limit (15 mg/L)"))
    
ggplot(data = bod_dat) +
  geom_line(aes(x = month, y = value)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = month, y = value, color = Exceedance), size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 15, linetype = "dashed", color = '#c92c3a') +
  geom_text(data = limit_labels, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label), vjust = -1) +
  labs(title = "Jones Island Effluent Total BOD5 Concentration",
       subtitle = "Values represent monthly means",
       y = "BOD5 (mg/L)",
       x = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  #lets make the points gray if exceedance is no, yellow if historic, and dark red if current
  scale_color_manual(values = c("gray20","darkred","goldenrod")) +
      theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        title = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "none")  +
  ylim(0,20) +
    xlim(ymd("2008-12-15"), ymd("2024-04-30")) 
  
  

```
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

# 5-Day Biochemical Oxygen Demand (cont.)

<br>

```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
bod_tbl <- 
  results |>
  mutate(Year =year(month),
         Month = month(month, label = TRUE)) |>
  filter(parameter_name == "BOD5") |>
  mutate(Value = round(value, digits = 0)) |>
  select(Year, Month, Value) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Month, values_from = Value) |>
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Jones Island Effluent BOD5 Concentration (mg/L)",
    subtitle  = "Values represent monthly means",
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    table.font.size = px(18),
    column_labels.padding = px(5),
    heading.title.font.size = px(25),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(20)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "top", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "bottom", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_fill(color = "lightgray")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(Year))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgray"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "left", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "right", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5))
    ),
    locations = cells_body(rows = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  # data_color(
  #   columns = lubridate::month(1:12,label = TRUE),  # Adjust to your actual month column names
  #   colors = scales::col_bin(
  #     bins = c(15.001, 20, 25),
  #     palette = c("goldenrod", "darkred"),
  #     domain = NULL
  #   )
  # ) |>
    tab_source_note(
    source_note = html(paste(
html(paste("<span style='color:#c92c3a;'> Red </span> values exceed current limit of 15mg/L."))
    )
    )) 

gtsave(bod_tbl, "bod_tbl.png")
knitr::include_graphics("bod_tbl.png")


```

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>



# Nitrogen Ammonia Total

<br>

```{r tn}

bod_dat <- filter(results, varnum == 6102)
bod_dat <- mutate(bod_dat,Exceedance =  case_when(
  value > 5 ~ "Current Limit (20 mg/L)", TRUE ~ "None"))
limit_labels <-
  data.frame(
    x = c(ymd_hms("2020-02-28 00:00:00")),
    y = c(5),
    label = c( "Current Limit (5 mg/L)"))
    
ggplot(data = bod_dat) +
  geom_line(aes(x = month, y = value)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = month, y = value, color = Exceedance), size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 5, linetype = "dashed", color = '#c92c3a') +
  geom_text(data = limit_labels, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label), vjust = -1, size = 4) +
  labs(title = "Jones Island Effluent Nitrogen Ammonia Total Concentration",
       subtitle = "Values represent monthly means",
       y = "NH3-N (mg/L)",
       x = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  #lets make the points gray if exceedance is no, yellow if historic, and dark red if current
  scale_color_manual(values = c("gray20","#c92c3a")) +
  ylim(0,6) +
        theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        title = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "none") +
    xlim(ymd("2008-12-15"), ymd("2024-04-30")) 
  

```
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>


# Nitrogen Ammonia Total (cont.)

<br>
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}

tn_tbl <- results |>
  mutate(Year =year(month),
         Month = month(month, label = TRUE)) |>
  filter(parameter_name == "TN") |>
  mutate(Value = round(value, digits = 2)) |>
  select(Year, Month, Value) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Month, values_from = Value) |>
  select(Year,Jan,Feb,Mar,Apr,May,Jun,Jul,Aug,Sep,Oct,Nov,Dec) |>
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Jones Island Effluent NH3-N Concentration (mg/L)",
    subtitle  = "Values represent monthly means",
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    table.font.size = px(18),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    column_labels.padding = px(5),
    heading.title.font.size = px(25),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(20)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "top", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "bottom", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_fill(color = "lightgray")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(Year))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgray"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "left", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "right", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5))
    ),
    locations = cells_body(rows = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  # data_color(
  #   columns = lubridate::month(1:12,label = TRUE),  # Adjust to your actual month column names
  #   colors = scales::col_bin(
  #     bins = c(5, 25),
  #     palette = c("darkred","blue"),
  #     domain = NULL
  #   )
  # ) |>
    tab_source_note(
    source_note = html(paste(
html(paste("<span style='color:#c92c3a;'> Red </span> values exceed current limit of 5mg/L."))
    )
    ))


gtsave(tn_tbl, "tn_tbl.png")
knitr::include_graphics("tn_tbl.png")

```

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>


# Fecal coliform

<br>
```{r fecal}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

# Ensure your results dataset and month variable are properly prepared
bod_dat <- filter(results, varnum == 6114)
bod_dat$month <- ymd(bod_dat$month)  # Convert to POSIXct if not already

bod_dat <- mutate(bod_dat, Exceedance = case_when(
  value > 200 & month < ymd("2023-08-01") ~ "Current Limit (200 CFU/100mL)",
  value > 100 & month >= ymd("2023-08-01") ~ "Current Limit (100 CFU/100mL)",
  TRUE ~ "None"
))

limit_labels <- data.frame(
  start = c(ymd("2015-01-01"), ymd("2019-01-01")),
  end = (c(ymd("2021-07-31"),  ymd("2021-04-15"))),
  y = c(85, 185),
  label = c("    Historic Limit \n (100 CFU/100mL)", "    Current Limit \n (200 CFU/100mL)")
)

plot_caption <- html(paste(
  "<span style='color:blue;'> Blue </span> Historic limit: 100CFU/mL. <br>",
  "<span style='color:red;'> Red </span> Current limit: 200CFU/mL."
))

ggplot(data = bod_dat) +
  geom_line(aes(x = month, y = value)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = month, y = value, color = Exceedance), size = 2) +
  geom_segment(
    x = min(bod_dat$month),
    xend = ymd("2023-07-30"),
    y = 100,
    yend = 100,
    color = "#c92c3a",
    linetype  = "dashed"
  ) +
    geom_segment(
    xend= max(bod_dat$month),
    x = ymd("2023-08-01"),
    y = 200,
    yend = 200,
    color = "#c92c3a",
    linetype  = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    x = ymd("2023-07-10"),
    xend = ymd("2022-10-01"),
    y = 201,
    yend = 210,
    color = "black",
    linetype  = "solid"
  ) +
  geom_text(data = limit_labels, aes(x = start, y = y, label = label), hjust = -0.1, vjust = -1, color = c('black','black')) +
  labs(title = "Jones Island Effluent Fecal coliform Concentration",
       subtitle = "Values represent monthly geometric means",
       y = "Fecal coliform (CFU/100mL)",
       x = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("gray20", "darkred", "blue")) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        title = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.position = "none") +
  ylim(0, 250) +
    xlim(ymd("2008-12-15"), ymd("2024-04-30")) 


```

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

# Fecal coliform (cont.)

<br>

```{r fecal_tbl, fig.align = 'center'}

library(gt)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(gt)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)


fecal_tbl <- results |>
  mutate(Year =year(month),
         Month = month(month, label = TRUE)) |>
  filter(parameter_name == "Fecal Coliform" ) |>
  mutate(Value = round(value, digits = 2)) |>
  select(Year, Month, Value) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Month, values_from = Value) |>
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Jones Island Effluent Fecal coliform Concentration",
    subtitle  = "Values represent geometric monthly means",
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    table.font.size = px(18),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(2),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    heading.title.font.size = px(25),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(20),
    column_labels.padding = px(5)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "top", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "bottom", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_fill(color = "lightgray")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(Year))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgray"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = "left", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5)),
      cell_borders(sides = "right", color = "gray85", style = "solid", weight = px(0.5))
    ),
    locations = cells_body(rows = TRUE)
  )  |>
  
   # tab_style(
   #  style = cell_fill(color = 'red'),
   #  locations = cells_body(
   #    columns = c(Apr), 
   #    rows = 6
   #  )) |>
    tab_source_note(
    source_note = html(paste(
html(paste("<span style='color:#c92c3a;'> Red </span> values exceed contract limit."))
    )
    ))



gtsave(fecal_tbl, "fecal_tbl.png")
knitr::include_graphics("fecal_tbl.png")

```

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

# Appendix - Missing Data

<span style = "font-size:16px">
Missing data observations are noted as follows:

-   <b> TP: </b> 02/28/2009

-   <b> TSS: </b>  02/28/2009, 05/26/2012, 08/30/2022

-   <b> BOD5: </b> 02/28/2009, 07/03/2009 - 07/05/2009, 12/26/2012 - 12/29/2012, 05/03/2014, 01/23/2019, 01/25/2019, 02/21/2022, 08/30/2022, 12/02/2023

-   <b> NH3-N: </b> 01/01/2008 - 03/11/2008, 02/28/2009, 03/29/2009, 08/01/2012

-   <b> Fecal Coliform: </b> 11/04/2010, 01/15/2011, 03/20/2011, 03/27/2011, 03/29/2011, 04/13/2011, 08/04/2011, 09/06/2011, 02/05/20112, 02/08/2012, 02/12/2012, 05/26/2012, 06/08/2013, 08/06/2013, 08/11/2013, 06/08/2015, 12/10/2015, 03/17//2016, 03/27/2016, 04/14/2016, 07/03/2016, 07/04/2016, 09/07/2016, 04/28/2017,  01/27/2019 - 01/30/2019, 03/17/2019, 12/06/2021, 07/15/2022



</span>
